titleStmt.title: SII 28.146: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 146. (A.R. No. 301 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra, north wall.

Records that several plots of land all totalling 1/2 vēli, 3 mā, 1(1/2) kāṇi, one mundirigai and kīḻ [1/4] had been granted so that the kollai land included in that total might be utilised to raise a garden and supply flowers to the temple and the rest, being cultivated land, might yield the income to pay ilakkai (clothes ?) and koṟṟu (maintenance/wages) to [two] persons tending the garden (nandavana-kkuḍigaḷ). The donor (probably) Araiyaṉ Edirilichōḻaṉ alias Chōḻiyavariyaṉ, the uḍaiyāṉ of Puṉṉai-vāyil in Iṅga-nāḍu in Arumoḻidēva-vaḷanāḍu, had purchased the land. The order of the king was requested by the donor to include the land donated as tirunāmattukkāṇi of the temple and have the record inscribed in the tirumāḷigai and the request was granted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī § yāṇṭu muppattāṟāvatu nāḷ nūṟu toṇṭaimāṉum tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyāṉum maturāntakap pirammamārāyaṉum Āḷuṭaiyār koyilukku
sāmutāyat tirumāḷikaikkūṟu tillai Ampalappallavaraiyaṉum ñThis ñ can be iṅnored.cikāriya(ñ) ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyiṉāyakañ ceyvārkaḷun tirumā
ḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷuñ ceyyat tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Arumoḻiteva vaḷanāṭṭu Iṅkaṇāṭṭup puṉṉai vāyiluṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ Etirili coḻaṉā
ṉa coḻiyavaraiyaṉ Irājādhirāja vaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai kaṭavāceriyāṉa tillai nāyakanallūriṟ kollai nilattile Orumāvaraikkāṇi mun
tirikaikkiḻkkāl nilam Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tevaṉ tirunilakaṇṭaṉ perilum Acceric cāttaṅkuṭiyāṉa mahipālakulakāla nallūril viḷai nilattile Āṟumākkāṇi nala laṉū
rāṉa Apimāṉamerunallūril viḷainilattile Āṟumā nilamum Ākappala taṭiyālum rūpāy ¬ ¿ 1muntiri ki Itil Uḻaiccāṇaṉ tevaṉ tirunilakaṇṭaṉ peril kaṭavācceriyā
ṉa tillaināyaka nallūṟpāl śrīcuntaracoḻavatikku meṟku śrīkaṇapati vāykkālukkut teṟku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟāñ catirattum teṟkiṟ paḷḷattu
kku nīrpāyum vāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār tirunantavaṉattukkut teṟkum Inta viṟka ṟaṉa nilattukku meṟkum ttaṉ
Uḷḷiṭṭār paḷḷa nilattukkuk kiḻakkum Ivvicainta Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilumuṭpaṭa Aḷantu koḷḷa vanta kuḻi 100 5 10 4 ṉāl 5 m vācciyaṉ poṉ
ṉampalakkūttaṉ peril Accericcāttaṅkuṭiyāṉa mahipālakulakālanallūṟpāl śrīcuntaracoḻavatikku meṟku śrīuttama coḻavāykkālukkut teṟku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nā
lāñ catirattuk karumāḷikai Eṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattiṉukkellai śrīkuntavai vatikkukkiḻakkum Araiyaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ tevarkaḷ tevaṉuḷḷiṭṭār nilattiṉukkut te
ṟkum Uṭaiyār tiruciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār palavaravai nilattiṉukku meṟkum Intappalavaravai nilattiṉukke vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicaitta Innāṉkellaiyilumuṭpaṭa karuttaḷavāka mi
kutik kuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka rūpāy Innilaṅ kālekāṇiyum Iṉṉamumivaṉukku viṟṟuk kuṭukkum Eṉṉilam Ivvatikku meṟku Ivvāykkālukkut teṟkum Aiñcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirat
tu pāṇaṉ ṭṭu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattiṉukkellai vācciyaṉ Iravi kūttaṉ nilattiṉukkuk kiḻakkum kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukkut teṟkum Aṟutikku meṟkum poṟiyātāṉi
lattukku vaṭakkum Ā ḷavāka mikutik kuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka vanta nilam Orumāvum Ākanilam Āṟumākkāṇiyum Uḻaiccāṇaṉ poṉṉampala
kkūttaṉ nakkaṉ peril pālaṉūrāḷa Apimāṉa merunallūrppāl śrīkuntavaivatikku meṟku jaṉ vāykkālukku vaṭakkuṅkiḻ catirattuk kūṉaṉ Oṭaikkuk kiḻakkum Uṭai
yār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār palavaravai nilattiṉukkut teṟkum Akarattāraṉupokattukku meṟkum kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicaitta Innāṉkellaiyilumuṭpaṭa karu
ttaḷavāka mikutikkuṟaivuḷḷaṭaṅka vanta nilam Āṟumāvum Āka nilam Araiye muṉṟu mākkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻkkāl Itiṟ kollai nilam Āḷuṭaiyārkkut tiruppaḷḷittāmat tiru
nantavaṉañ ceytu tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku mutalāka Aḷakkavum viḷainilam Innantavaṉakkuṭikaḷiruvaṟku Ilakkaikkuṅ koṟṟukkum viṭṭu Ivarkaḷaṉupavittu vārā niṉṟateṉṟum Iṉṉilam
tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka kaikkoṇṭu palavaravaiyuṭaṉe kūṭṭi Ippaṭikkut tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭavum Iṉṉilattuc cātaṉaṅkaḷ ṭukkuvittukkoḷḷavuṅ kaṭavatā
kap peṟaveṇumeṉṟu Ivaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatākac coṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyyap paṇṇuvatu § Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantiraolai neṟiyuṭaiyaccoḻa
muventaveḷāṉ poṉ Ippaṭi tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai villavarāyaṉeḻuttu § Ivai cittarāyaṉeḻuttu § Ivai vāṇātarāyaṉeḻuttu § Ivai toṇṭaimāṉeḻuttu §
Ivai kāṭavarāyaṉeḻuttu § Ivai viḻiñattaraiyaṉeḻuttu § Ivai ciṅkaḷarāyaṉeḻuttu § Ivai Aṅkarāyaṉeḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
